name: Hip Adductor Machine
form_cues: Sit tall with your back flat against the pad
Squeeze the pads together with control — no slamming
Pause 1 sec at full adduction, slow eccentric on the way out
notes: Seated machine. Press knees inward against resistance pads — inner-thigh counterpart to the abductor machine.
video_id_query: Hip Adductor Machine how to proper form
instructions: Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and place your inner knees against the resistance pads.
Set the start position so the pads are comfortably apart; grip the handles.
Squeeze the pads together by adducting your hips — pause briefly when the pads meet.
Control the return; don't let the stack pull your legs apart quickly.
